## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Flosum and GrowthX teams to discuss ongoing projects, updates, and priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/e5_cmzDHfkcTH54v43m7SBUA3Qr94kXX?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [227-250 security and zero trust-related keywords identified for review, with zero trust being a particularly promising area](https://fathom.video/share/e5_cmzDHfkcTH54v43m7SBUA3Qr94kXX?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Homepage conversion recommendations still pending but less urgent due to Dreamforce preparations](https://fathom.video/share/e5_cmzDHfkcTH54v43m7SBUA3Qr94kXX?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Flosum team to review and provide feedback on new keyword clusters, especially regarding relevancy and focus areas](https://fathom.video/share/e5_cmzDHfkcTH54v43m7SBUA3Qr94kXX?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Dreamforce is a major priority for Flosum, potentially affecting next week's meeting schedule](https://fathom.video/share/e5_cmzDHfkcTH54v43m7SBUA3Qr94kXX?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)

## Topics

### Workload and Time Management

  - [Both teams experiencing end-of-year rush and busy schedules](https://fathom.video/share/e5_cmzDHfkcTH54v43m7SBUA3Qr94kXX?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Beau (Flosum) feeling behind on multiple tasks](https://fathom.video/share/e5_cmzDHfkcTH54v43m7SBUA3Qr94kXX?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Discussion on improving commitment strategies and deadline setting](https://fathom.video/share/e5_cmzDHfkcTH54v43m7SBUA3Qr94kXX?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)

### Content and Keyword Strategy

  - [30 total keywords identified in security, security posture, DevOps, DevSecOps, and zero trust categories](https://fathom.video/share/e5_cmzDHfkcTH54v43m7SBUA3Qr94kXX?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Zero trust keywords highlighted as particularly valuable ("gold") by Saakshi](https://fathom.video/share/e5_cmzDHfkcTH54v43m7SBUA3Qr94kXX?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [Keyword relevancy ranges discussed: aiming for 30-90% relevance, avoiding 5% relevance topics](https://fathom.video/share/e5_cmzDHfkcTH54v43m7SBUA3Qr94kXX?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Potential to explore more top-of-funnel content (e.g., general DevSecOps)](https://fathom.video/share/e5_cmzDHfkcTH54v43m7SBUA3Qr94kXX?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Salesforce-specific keywords noted to narrow volume but increase relevance](https://fathom.video/share/e5_cmzDHfkcTH54v43m7SBUA3Qr94kXX?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)

### Ongoing Projects and Updates

  - [Homepage conversion recommendations still on Jakub's to-do list, but less urgent](https://fathom.video/share/e5_cmzDHfkcTH54v43m7SBUA3Qr94kXX?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Beau to provide blog updates by next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/e5_cmzDHfkcTH54v43m7SBUA3Qr94kXX?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Looker report updated with impression change notation (9/15)](https://fathom.video/share/e5_cmzDHfkcTH54v43m7SBUA3Qr94kXX?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [5 articles on hold, pending internal technical review at Flosum](https://fathom.video/share/e5_cmzDHfkcTH54v43m7SBUA3Qr94kXX?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)

### Dreamforce Preparations

  - [Major focus for Flosum team](https://fathom.video/share/e5_cmzDHfkcTH54v43m7SBUA3Qr94kXX?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [Next week's meeting may be canceled due to event attendance](https://fathom.video/share/e5_cmzDHfkcTH54v43m7SBUA3Qr94kXX?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [GrowthX offered support for social media amplification](https://fathom.video/share/e5_cmzDHfkcTH54v43m7SBUA3Qr94kXX?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
